tasks.title: Project Setup & Minimalist UI Skeleton
tasks.description: Set up SPA with semantic HTML, baseline CSS for minimal aesthetic, and project structure. Establish the visual foundation that serves as a key differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: HTML structure with input field, add button, and todo list container
CSS styling with clean, minimalist design (focus on typography and whitespace)
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
Project structure ready for JavaScript implementation

tasks.title: Todo CRUD Operations & localStorage Integration
tasks.description: Implement add, edit, delete operations for todos with localStorage persistence. Core functionality ensuring data persists across browser sessions.
acceptance_criteria: Add todo with text input and button
Display todos in list with completion checkbox and delete button
Edit existing todos with inline editing or modal
All changes persist to localStorage automatically
Load todos from localStorage on page refresh

tasks.title: Polish & Micro-interactions
tasks.description: Add smooth animations, visual feedback for interactions, and refinement to the minimalist design to enhance user delight without complexity.
acceptance_criteria: Visual feedback on button clicks and checkbox state changes
Keyboard shortcuts (Enter to add, Escape to cancel edits)

tasks.title: PWA Setup & Offline Capabilities
tasks.description: Add service worker and manifest for offline-first PWA experience, enabling app-like usage without internet connection.
acceptance_criteria: Service worker registration and caching strategy
Web app manifest with app name, icons, and theme colors
Install prompt available on supporting browsers

architecture.data_model: Array of todo objects: {id: string, text: string, completed: boolean, created_at: timestamp}
